description: LOB preamble: 12-byte header + 8-byte separators every 65536 bytes for dict blobs > 65536 bytes
note: cs_lob_preamble.bak (SS2022, 1400 rows of nvarchar(4000) with long distinct values) produces a 587756-byte dict blob that exceeds the 65536-byte threshold and exercises the LOB preamble + deinterleave path. Confirmed separately with cs_lob_preamble2.bak (1200-row varchar fixture).
